narrative:
Precinct Toledo 6I (precinct in Lucas County) has 1,189 registered voters, with 65.6% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 9.1% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 25.3%, a pronounced Democratic lean of 16.2 percentage points.
